subcodes.first_line: The son of the spiritual elder - upon them both be My glory - did, by the leave of the Lord of mankind, set forth towards that most distant goal, traversing arduous paths [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ابن پیر روحانی علیهما بهائی باذن مولی الوری قصد مقصد اقصی نمود مشقت سبل
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @permission for visit; pilgrimage, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @call to action
